curriculumRef.value: NCE Chemistry Year 1 — CHE 111 General Chemistry

title: Future Minor Version — Additive Fields and Types

blocks.title: Known block with an unknown optional field
blocks.subtitle: An optional field added by schema 1.7 — v1.0 consumers must tolerate it

citations.excerpt: The table was later refined by Henry Moseley, who used X-ray spectroscopy to show that the elements should be ordered by atomic number rather than atomic mass.

blocks.body: Moseley reordered the periodic table by **atomic number**, resolving Mendeleev's anomalies.

blocks.title: A block type introduced after v1.0
blocks.text: Argon sits before potassium even though it is heavier — atomic number, not mass, orders the table.
